plugin.name: AI Auto Translate
plugin.description: 'AI Auto Translate' plug-in integrates deeply into the Admin Panel content management section to easy translation of any content type: 'Single Type', 'Collection Type', or 'Component'.
settings.title: AI Auto Translate Settings
settings.enableTranslateForContentType: Enable translation for this content type
headerActions.translate.dialog.title: Translate with AI
settings.aiProviders.description: Manage AI providers and their credentials
settings.aiProviders.emptyState.noProvid: No AI provider has been created yet. This should have been created automatically.
translate.success: Translation was successful. Model: "{model}". Target locale: "{locale}"
translate.failure: Translation was not successful. See backend console for details. Model: "{model}". Target locale: "{locale}"
